rule: Free or trial data can unlock diagnostics but cannot by itself override OOS history requirements.
reason: A short trial window can prove plumbing but not durable alpha.

rule: Each provider may only be used for the data class named in its contract.
reason: Prevents treating a price source as a direction source.

rule: No disabled sleeve weight redistribution is allowed.
reason: Prevents a partial data run from impersonating a complete portfolio test.

rule: Any Databento or other paid-credit query requires a pre-run bounded query gate.
reason: Prevents accidental cost and post-hoc documentation.

rule: Public/freemium catalyst calendars are non-promotable until PIT completeness and revision policy are audited.
Commercial demos should be requested only with exact missing fields and sample symbols/events.
reason: Prevents wasting demo access on vague exploration.
